name: Auto-open PR on push
description: Opens a PR to main when work is pushed to a feature branch without an existing open PR.

prompts.prompt:
You are automating PR creation for serhatozdursun/resume (personal portfolio site).

TRIGGER: A push event fired on this repository.

RULES:
1. If the pushed branch is `main`, stop immediately — do nothing.
2. Check whether an open PR already exists from this branch to `main`. If one exists, stop — do nothing.
3. Otherwise, open a new PR targeting `main`.

PR CONTENT:
- Title: concise summary from branch name and latest commit message.
- Body: 2–4 bullet points summarizing changes from commit messages.
- Open as a ready PR (not draft).

After opening, comment: "PR opened by automation. CI babysit + auto-merge will run when checks complete."

Do not modify code — only create the PR.
